tasks.title: Implement Core Foundation
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Core Foundation. The essential building blocks of the project.

tasks.title: Implement Documentation Ingestion Pipeline
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Documentation Ingestion Pipeline. Create a documentation ingestion pipeline that accepts PRD/TDD and related project docs, normalizes and chunks content, stores metadata for traceability, and produces a searchable structured knowledge base used to drive Mnemos implementation planning.

tasks.title: Implement Multi-Format Input Service
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Multi-Format Input Service. Support ingestion of raw text and file-based inputs (TXT, MD, JSON, CSV), preserving source metadata and timestamps for downstream traceability.

tasks.title: Implement Parser and Event Normalization
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Parser and Event Normalization. Normalize heterogeneous inputs into immutable events with schema versioning and source linkage, forming the canonical Input -> Event transformation.

tasks.title: Implement Append-Only Event Store
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Append-Only Event Store. Implement a local-first SQLite-backed append-only event store with indexes for timestamp and source input ID to support reliable replay and query foundations.

tasks.title: Implement Claim Extraction Engine
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Claim Extraction Engine. Derive structured claims (fact, hypothesis, decision) from events, enforce validation rules, and map each claim to at least one evidence event.

tasks.title: Implement Relationship Detection Engine
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Relationship Detection Engine. Detect support and contradiction relationships between claims within scoped comparisons and persist relationship edges for truth evolution analysis.

tasks.title: Implement CLI Query Interface
tasks.description: Implement the feature: CLI Query Interface. Provide a CLI query interface that returns structured answers with claims, surfaced contradictions, and an evidence-backed timeline.

tasks.title: Implement Workflow Orchestration and Observability
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Workflow Orchestration and Observability. Track ingestion/extraction/relationship jobs through explicit workflow states with structured logging, retries, timeouts, and failure handling.

tasks.title: Implement Claim Extraction Heuristics v2
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Claim Extraction Heuristics v2. Improve claim extraction quality by splitting event text into sentence-level candidate claims, deduplicating near-identical claims, and applying stronger heuristic scoring for fact/decision/hypothesis classification while preserving evidence traceability.

tasks.title: Implement SQLC Typed Data Access
tasks.description: Implement the feature: SQLC Typed Data Access. Adopt sqlc for SQLite data-access to replace handwritten SQL in repositories with generated, typed query methods; include schema/queries layout, generation command, and initial migration of core event and claim reads/writes.

tasks.title: Implement SQLC Migration Phase 2
tasks.description: Implement the feature: SQLC Migration Phase 2. Complete sqlc adoption by migrating relationship and compilation job repositories to generated typed queries, reducing handwritten SQL and unifying data access patterns.

tasks.title: Implement One-Step Process Command
tasks.description: Implement the feature: One-Step Process Command. Add a CLI `process` command that runs ingest, extract, and relate in one workflow for either file input or raw text, then prints IDs/counts so users can immediately run query without manual event ID lookups.
